hero.tagline: Community Support for the Journey of Africans and Inspiring Leaders
hero.subtitle: CAP ALI supports young Beninese and French-speaking Africans before, during and after their arrival in France. Mentorship, resources, community — everything you need to succeed.

mission.title: Building bridges between Africa and France
mission.description: CAP ALI was born from a simple observation: too many young Africans arrive in France without guidance, without a network and without support. Our mission is to break this isolation by creating a supportive, structured and accessible community for all.
mission.pillar1_desc: Help pre-departure students with their academic choices, Campus France procedures and departure preparation.
mission.pillar2_desc: Connect every newcomer with a mentor established in France, in their city and field of expertise.
mission.pillar3_desc: Create a vibrant community of mutual aid, exchanges and events so no one ever feels alone again.

mentorship.title: A mentor who understands you, in your city, in your field
mentorship.description: Our mentorship program connects newcomers with members who have been living in France for over 6 months. Each mentor is verified by our team and commits to supporting 1 to 3 young people per month.
mentorship.step1_desc: Create your profile in minutes and indicate your field, city and needs.
mentorship.step2_desc: Browse verified mentor profiles, filter by city and field, and send your request.
mentorship.step3_desc: Your mentor guides you through procedures, answers your questions and supports you.

resources.title: Practical guides for every step of your journey
resources.description: Articles, videos and webinars on housing, banking, studies, employment, health and administrative procedures — created by our community, for our community.
resources.empty: Resources are coming soon. We're preparing quality content to support you.

events.title: Let's meet, in person
events.description: Networking evenings, practical workshops, orientation webinars — CAP ALI organizes events in France, Benin and online to strengthen our community bonds.
events.empty: No upcoming events at the moment. Stay connected, the next ones are coming soon!

forum.title: Ask your questions, share your experience
forum.description: A space for exchange between CAP ALI community members. Housing, studies, jobs, daily life — there's always someone to help.
forum.empty: The forum is opening soon. Get ready to connect with the community!

founders.title: The faces behind CAP ALI
founders.lucinda_quote: I created CAP ALI because I know what it's like to arrive in a country without any guidance. Every young person deserves someone who reaches out and says: you are not alone. That's the hand we want to be.
founders.jessica_quote: Our strength is our community. Every mentor, every active member, every shared experience builds a bridge between two worlds. CAP ALI is proof that solidarity knows no borders.

partners.title: Our partners and supporters
partners.description: Together, we build a strong support network for the African diaspora in France.

cta_section.title: Ready to join the adventure?
cta_section.subtitle: Whether you're a pre-departure student, a newcomer or have been settled for years — your place is here. Join CAP ALI and be part of a community that makes a difference.

footer.description: Community Support for the Journey of Africans and Inspiring Leaders. Non-profit association dedicated to supporting young Africans in France.
footer.made_with: Made with ❤️ for the African diaspora

donate.title: Support CAP ALI
donate.description: Your donation funds mentorship, events and resources for young Africans in France.
